The '''Protector PRP-502 hold-out shooter''', was a small, light, hold-out [[dart shooter]] manufactured by [[Prax Arms/Legends|Prax Arms]]. This weapon had a range of only about twenty-five meters, but could be broken down into four pieces for easy concealment and transportation.

==Description==
Manufactured by [[Prax Arms/Legends|Prax Arms]], the Protector PRP-502 was a typical model of [[dart shooter]]. It used a high-tension spring within its design to propel a [[Dart/Legends|dart]] towards a target. The Protector PRP-502 was loaded with a clip of six darts, and a dart could be fired every three [[Standard second|seconds]]. Clips could be changed in seconds using the weapon's sliding release lever.<ref name="EGWT" />

The weapon had a maximum range of twenty-five [[Meter/Legends|meters]], and an optimum range of ten meters. The Protector PRP-502 was noiseless in its operation, and was exceptionally light,<ref name="EGWT" /> weighing only half a [[Kilogram/Legends|kilogram]].<ref name="AE" /> It was easily concealable and hard to detect as it had no energy emitters or [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]]. Furthermore, the Protector PRP-502 could be broken into four separate pieces, allowing it to be hidden and to avoid being detected by [[security sensor]]s. Reassembly of the weapon could be achieved in less than five seconds.<ref name="EGWT" />
